mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: psychosis, restlessness, difficulty standing, progressive proximal muscle weakness, hand muscle atrophy, myopathy, EMG abnormality, somatic sensory dysfunction, liver involvement (viriral hepatitis)

short stature, skeletal anomalies (abnormal clavicle morphology, vertebral fusion), joint laxity (clumsiness), corneal opacities (conjunctival and scleral pigmentation), cardiac involvement (mitral regurgitation, single ventricle)

angiokeratomas (hemangiomas, telangiectasias), hypohidrosis, gastrointestinal symptoms (diarrhea, diffuse peripheral demyelination), renal involvement (renal failure), ischemic events (cardiomegaly, mitral regurgitation, tricuspid regurgitation, pulmonary valve defects)

mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.disease_name: Immunodeficiency 32B, monocyte and dendritic cell deficiency, autosomal recessive
mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: neonatal or early childhood onset, psychomotor deterioration, spastic paraplegia, optic atrophy, sensorimotor axonal loss, deafness, seizures, increased deep tendon reflexes, urinary tract infection susceptibility

tall stature with disproportionate extremities, scoliosis, pectus excavatum, ectopia lentis, arachnodactyly, dural ectasia, mitral valve prolapse, aortic root dilatation, lung complications (dyspnea, recurrent respiratory infections)
epilepsy, intellectual disability, facial angiofibromas, shagreen patches, ungual fibromas, retinal hamartomas, cardiac rhabdomyomas, kidney angiomyolipomas, gingival fibromas
easy bruising, skin fragility, joint hypermobility, vascular rupture risk, diverticular hernia, intestinal bleeding, chronic pain, orthostatic intolerance, autonomic instability
muscle weakness, exercise intolerance, heart problems (hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, left ventricular noncompaction), respiratory issues (difficulty breathing, sleep apnea), enlarged tongue
choreiform movements, cognitive decline, psychiatric disturbances (psychosis, depression), weight loss, ocular signs (retinitis pigmentosa, papilloedema), pyramidal sign deficit
night blindness, hearing loss, peripheral polyneuritis, ataxia, tremors, ichthyotic skin changes, anosmia, cataracts, mental retardation
